title: rigiolepis moultonii subsp. moultonii
intro: Rigiolepis moultonii subsp. moultonii, also known as the Moulton's Rigiolepis or Moulton's Dendrobium, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Borneo. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Rigiolepis moultonii subsp. moultonii include its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can aid in the treatment of various infections and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
